metadata.title: Fresh Start
metadata.journal: Same plan as before, Frigerate through Normal, respec to something else before Hell.

metadata.title: Level 20
metadata.journal: ~15 minutes for some tomb runs on normal. We'll see if I accidentally find Duriel

metadata.title: Made it to Act 3
metadata.description: Duriel down, made it to Act 3.
metadata.journal: Also found my  first HC unique ring! It's a low Nagel, but still pretty cool.
